tasks.name: Create dashboard types file with all widget interfaces
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript types for DashboardData, CourseProgressData, AssessmentScoreData, TasksSummaryData, ActivityItem, and PresentationData to enable type-safe loaders and widgets

constraints: Types must match database table structures
No runtime validation (Zod) needed - trust RLS

tasks.input_state: No types directory exists in apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/
tasks.output_state: apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts exists with exported types: DashboardData, CourseProgressData, AssessmentScoreData, TasksSummaryData, ActivityItem (union), PresentationData
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists at correct path with all 6 type exports and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'export type DashboardData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'export type CourseProgressData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'export type AssessmentScoreData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'export type TasksSummaryData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'export type ActivityItem' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'export type PresentationData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add JSDoc comments to dashboard types

action.target: JSDoc comments to dashboard type interfaces

tasks.purpose: Improve developer experience with inline documentation explaining each type's purpose and field meanings

constraints: Document each interface and its key fields

tasks.input_state: dashboard.types.ts exists with type definitions but no JSDoc comments
tasks.output_state: All exported types have JSDoc comments describing their purpose and key fields
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Each exported type has a /** */ JSDoc comment above it and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -B 2 'export type DashboardData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts | grep -q '/\*\*' && grep -B 2 'export type CourseProgressData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts | grep -q '/\*\*' && pnpm typecheck
